chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-124 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.567/25 3. For hearing of main case 04.03.2025 Petitioners are present in person Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG for the State along with the Investigation Officer.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The Investigation Officer of FIR bearing Crime No.372/2023 of Police Station Sharani Goth District Malir, Karachi present and on direction of this Court has recorded statement u/s 161 Cr.P.C of the petitioner No.1 namely Mst. Maryam wherein she denied the allegation of such FIR and supported the contention made in the petition. I.O submitted such statement of Mst. Maryam and progress report in respect of above said FIR, which are taken on record. Official respondents No.2 i.e SSP, Sukkur has also submitted statement. I.O further submits that earlier case was disposed of under “A” class as on that time the petitioner’s statement was not recorded. However, after the statement of the petitioner, he will file report by cancelling the case under “C” class. Such exercise shall be completed by the I.O within 15 days. After the statement of the I.O, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition and prayed that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. The petition is disposed of along with pending application, with direction to the I.O to file report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 days. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when they require. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
